chapter_title.en: Evidence of the Imamate of Imam Musa Kadhim (a.s) and refutation of Waqifiya

text: وحدثني جعفر بن سليمان عن داود الصرمي عن علي بن أبي حمزة قال قال لي أبو عبد الله عليه السلام: من جاءك فقال لك إنه مرض ابني هذا وأغمضه وغسله ووضعه في لحده ونفض يده من تراب قبره فلا تصدقه.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 48 - He said: and Ja’far bin Sulaiman narrated to me, from Dawood Sarmi, from Ali bin Hamza who said, "Abu 'Abdillah (a.s) said to me: 'Whoever comes to you and says to you that this son of mine [Imam Kadhim (a.s.)] became sick, and he [Imam as-Sadiq (a.s.)] closed his eyes, washed him, placed him in his grave, and shook off the dust from his grave, do not believe him.'"
